# open-rgs

> MIT-licensed Remote Game Server. Bun runtime, snap-in Lua maths,
> pluggable wallet adapters, binary-msgpack on the wire. One Bun file
> boots a working server. Built for slots, instant games, Mines,
> Chicken-Road, crash, and any other casino round shape.

## Start here

- [How it works](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/overview): mile-high — the four parts (transport, orchestrator, Lua math, wallet adapter) and how a round flows through them
- [You can build…](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/build): recipes per game shape — slot, Mines, Chicken Road, crash, gamble, feature buys. The math file changes, everything else stays
- [You can extend…](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/extend): plug your own wallet, transport, Lua VM helpers, metrics, log formatter

## Reference

- [Boot](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/boot): createServer config, GameManifest, ports, graceful shutdown
- [Wire](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/wire): binary-msgpack frame format and full request/response payload shapes
- [Math · simple](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/math): single-call Lua math for slots, instant-win, dice, plinko
- [Math · complex](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/complex): open/step/close Lua math with a full Mines example; covers Chicken-Road, crash, gamble, hold-and-spin, pick bonuses
- [Platform adapter](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/adapter): PlatformAdapter interface, money flow, session lifecycle, idempotency
- [Admin & probes](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/admin): /livez, /readyz, /healthz, /admin/* endpoints, suffix-matched routes
- [Errors](https://open-rgs.schmooky.dev/errors): canonical RGSErrorCode vocabulary

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/open-rgs/open-rgs)
- [Spec corpus](https://github.com/open-rgs/open-rgs/tree/main/specs)
- [MIT License](https://github.com/open-rgs/open-rgs/blob/main/LICENSE)
